operator_steps: Start with wave 1 and keep collection_priority order unless a source owner supplies a full export.
Use cro_address_count_url for public company-count baselines where CRO Open Services access is available.
Use cro_address_search_url or an approved bulk export to get company-number join keys.
Fill company_count plus source_note, source_url, source_date, and approved_by before merge.
Merge only rows that pass company-universe preflight and include source approval metadata.
private_data_policy: Do not commit private exports; publish only aggregate approved company-universe rows.
